Bash(python3 -c "import database; database.init_db\(\); print\('DB OK'\); s = database.get_stats\(\); print\('Stats:', s\); orders = database.get_orders\(situacao='Pedido - Em Produção'\); print\(f'Em Producao: {len\(orders\)} registros'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Situacoes:', len\(d['por_situacao']\)\); print\('Substatuses:', len\(d['por_substatus']\)\); print\('Sem substatus:', d['em_producao_sem_substatus']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Found:', d['found']\); o=d['order']; print\('OP:', o['op']\); print\('Cliente:', o['razao_social']\); print\('Situacao:', o['situacao']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Updated OP:', d['op']\); print\('Sub-status:', d['substatus_nome']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('History entries:', len\(d\)\); [print\(' -', h['substatus_anterior'], '->', h['substatus_novo'], '@', h['atualizado_em']\) for h in d]")
